name: Cheese Bread Pudding
recipeInstructions:
1. Butter a 1-quart baking dish.
2. Layer half the bread cubes in the dish.
3. Sprinkle with half the cheese.
4. Repeat with remaining bread cubes and cheese.
5. Beat remaining ingredients together and pour over bread and cheese.
6. Let stand one hour.
7. Place baking dish in a 9-inch x 13-inch pan.
8. Pour water into pan to a depth of one inch.
9. Place pan in preheated 350-degree oven.
10. Bake for one hour. Pudding should be puffy and golden.
